name: Tokyo

palette.name: Metropolitan Green
palette.rationale: The Tokyo metropolitan symbol is commonly presented in a vivid green associated with future growth.

palette.name: Night Glass
palette.rationale: Dark glass and steel high-rises shape an editorial neutral for Tokyo's evening skyline.

sources.title: Tokyo Metropolitan Government
sources.note: Used for official metropolitan identity context.

sources.title: Corporate Identity
sources.note: Retained as transport-brand context for future mobility-layer refinement.

notes: Seed record with one official metropolitan identity color and one editorial urban-system color; intentionally compact to exercise short palettes.
editorialSummary: Tokyo's compact starter palette combines official metropolitan green with dark skyline glass to suggest civic identity and high-density night architecture.
